description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 37 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 6 cm Textured leatherette upper Two handles Rivet and metal loop details on the front for style A zippered pocket on the front One main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket and two pouches Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
